mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp_attendance_record (user_id, user_name, attendance_date, check_in_time, check_out_time, work_hours, status, remark) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{attendanceDate}, #{checkInTime}, #{checkOutTime}, #{workHours}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM emp_attendance_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND attendance_date = #{attendanceDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp_attendance_record (user_id, user_name, attendance_date, check_in_time, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{attendanceDate}, #{checkInTime}, #{status})
INSERT INTO emp_attendance_record (user_id, user_name, attendance_date, check_out_time, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{attendanceDate}, #{checkOutTime}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE emp_attendance_record SET check_in_time = #{checkInTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE emp_attendance_record SET check_out_time = #{checkOutTime} WHERE id = #{id}
